era: 1994-1995. Rock. E=6 -- meditative, soulful, emotionally dense. Capitol Hill. Columbia Records.
associated_musicians: Mother Love Bone (Andrew Wood, referenced in context)

theory_nodes.concept: Seattle supergroup. AIC + Pearl Jam + Screaming Trees. One album: Above (1995). Born from addiction and recovery. Born from Seattle's grief (Wood 1990, Cobain April 1994).
theory_nodes.description: The most important supergroup in Seattle history.

theory_nodes.concept: Aquatic imagery in Staley's lyrics: river, surfacing, above, long gone day, deceit as water. PNW water city. Osprey pair is exact: zone between water and sky.
E=6 streak reaches 3 degrees (222-224). Character changes: territorial→commercial→meditative. Same energy level, three emotional registers.
theory_nodes.description: The E=6 arc: urgency to commerce to depth.

cross_references.relationship: E=6 continues. Post-grunge commercial to supergroup depth. Same energy, opposite soul.
E=6 arc begins at 222. Territorial urgency to meditative depth across three degrees.

sps_pair.pairing_note: FIRST PANDIONIDAE. Water and sky zone. Osprey hunts by diving into water from flight. Above inhabits the zone between submersion and surfacing. Most resonant pair in raptor era.
